weeklyIntro: Three runs, every week, every pace — walkers included. Show up, say hi, and someone will make sure you're never out there alone. First time? Just look for the group.

schedule.description: An easygoing evening on Lake McMurtry's single-track. We run in groups by pace and regroup along the way — nobody gets left in the woods. In the darker months, bring a headlamp.
A social road run from Stonecloud Brewing through downtown Stillwater. Routes are short and flexible, and the real point is the patio afterward. Walkers welcome.
The Saturday morning staple. Meet at Aspen Coffee downtown for anything from an easy few miles to a long run, then stick around for coffee with the crew.
